name: Missed work after slip at warehouse job in Murray UT, what benefits?

mainEntity.name: Missed work after slip at warehouse job in Murray UT, what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability: 2/3 wages tax-free, up to 52 weeks initially.** Medical 100% covered.[3] Key factors: Doctor excuses needed. Permanent partial later. Vocational rehab if can't return. Lawyer ensures full pay.
